productDisplayName: Puma Men's Kraftek Black Metalic Silver Shoe
description: Pay tribute to the ultimate Sports car with this Kraftek Scuderia ferrari lifestyle shoe from puma. The edgy design performs well on the race course and looks equally cool with casual wear in urban settings. Upper Leather and synthetic upper for comfortable Fit Tongue, toe box and inner lining have perforations for breathability Lace-ups for snug fit Metal Scuderia Ferrari badge on the side to create a fashion statement Implied puma formstripe on the side with Puma jumping cat logo Heel cup for protection and to lock down the heel in place, keeping it safe from injuries Midsole Phylon midsole for superior shock absorption and lightweight comfort Outsole Rubber sole with tire profile design for perfect grip on any terrain Synthetic toe guard stitched onto upper and rubber heel guard
